eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 03:56 PM ON MAY 18, 2026 Effective until 07:56 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
DANGEROUS STORM WARNING. Tornado laden storms will be entering the area. High risk of heavy rain, high winds, hail and a chance of tornadoes.  Take precautions and find shelter.
Approximate times: Sheridan 6:15 PM, Grant City 6:39 PM, 
Allendale 6:50 PM
Thunderstorms will continue overnight.
